tone: Simple, natural, clear and friendly English for Indian retail investors
writing_style: Use a truthful hook, short sentences and easy words. Explain why the update matters without sounding promotional or robotic.

market_holidays.name: Prakash Gurpurb Sri Guru Nanak Dev

education_topics: What is a P/E ratio and why does it matter?
What is the difference between revenue and profit?
How can an RBI rate cut affect banks and borrowers?
Why can crude oil prices affect Indian markets?
Why can rupee movement affect IT companies?
What do FII and DII mean?
What is the difference between Nifty and Sensex?
Why do bond yields matter to stock markets?
engagement_topics: Which sector are you watching next week: Banking, IT, Auto or Pharma?
What should a beginner learn first: P/E ratio, market cap, mutual funds or index funds?
Which market update helps you most: pre-market, stock focus, education or closing summary?
What affects Indian markets more in your view: crude oil, rupee, global markets or interest rates?
